name: Forcepoint DLP
description: Integrates with Forcepoint Data Loss Prevention REST API for incident management, policy configuration, and data discovery

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve a list of DLP and Discovery incidents with optional filtering by date, action, severity, or policy

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Filter by action type (e.g., BLOCK, PERMIT, ENCRYPT)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity level (HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW)

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return (max 10000)

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve full details of a specific DLP incident by its unique ID

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of incident IDs to retrieve

actions.name: List Policies
actions.description: Retrieve a list of all enabled DLP and Discovery policies

actions.name: Get Policy Details
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific DLP policy including rules and resources

parameters.name: policyId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP policy

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update the status or remediation action for a DLP incident

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the incident to update

actions.name: Get Authentication Token
actions.description: Obtain a JWT access token for authenticating subsequent API requests

parameters.name: refreshToken
parameters.description: Refresh token obtained from initial authentication
